title: Day 1 Lesson 2 ( Video )Asking for someone-s major
html:
Day 1 - Lesson 2

せんもん を きく  = Asking for someone's major

ばしょ (Location): がっこう = School

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): がくせい (student), しんにゅうせい (new student)

The new words you find in this lesson are:

せんもん (senmon) = speciality/major

なん (nan) = what

ですか (des ka) = is it?

にほんご (nihongo) = Japanese

そうですか (soudeska) = I see
